notes: Port listing cross-confirmed from Samsung US business support page (spec text: 'RS232C (In/Out) Thru Stereo Jack, RJ45', 'RGB: DVI-D, Display Port 1.2, VIDEO: HDMI 2.0 (2), HDMI 2.0 (Loop-out)'), the QBR/QMR shared user manual on ManualsLib (page 9 rear panel diagram), and the Samsung QB Series user manual (same hardware platform). The QM85R-B is a revised variant (IP5x rated); port layout is the same as the base QM85R. RS232C in/out use 3.5mm stereo mini-jack connectors requiring a Samsung-supplied adapter — connector type set to trs-3.5 with note. IR IN also uses a 3.5mm jack. Power connector is IEC C14 (detachable cord; not a captive/NEMA cord as on consumer displays). No VGA port. DVI port is DVI-D (single-link, also serves as MagicInfo player module slot).

ports.name: DVI/HDMI AUDIO IN
ports.note: 3.5mm stereo mini-jack for audio input (used when source is connected via DVI or HDMI without embedded audio)

ports.name: RS232C IN
ports.note: RS-232C control via 3.5mm stereo mini-jack adapter (Samsung spec lists as 'RS232C Thru Stereo Jack')

ports.name: RS232C OUT
ports.note: RS-232C control via 3.5mm stereo mini-jack adapter

ports.name: IR IN
ports.note: External IR extender input via 3.5mm jack

ports.name: AC IN
ports.note: IEC C14 inlet; detachable power cord, 100–240 V AC 50/60 Hz
